## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Tests (adding or updating tests)

## Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Type checks pass locally
- [ ] Manually tested the following scenarios:
  - Tested sentiment accuracy
  - Tested WebGPU acceleration (if applicable)
  - Tested CPU fallback
  - Verified real-time performance
  - Checked memory cleanup
  - Tested with various text inputs

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes are ready for review

## Sentiment Analysis Considerations

- [ ] Memory cleanup is properly handled

- [ ] Browser compatibility is tested
